name: Cucumber Filled with Avocado Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. If you have a hothouse cucumber, simply wash and dry it.
2. If not, remove the peel lengthwise, leaving thin green stripes.
3. Cut the cucumber in half lengthwise.
4. Using an apple corer or teaspoon, create channels three quarters of an inch wide and equally deep in each half, cutting through to the seeds.
5. Discard the seeds.
6. Crush the garlic.
7. Pulverize the pine nuts in a blender, mini-food processor, or mortar and pestle.
8. In a small bowl, mix the crushed garlic, pulverized pine nuts, minced basil leaves, and salt.
9. Mash the avocado with a fork and pass it through a sieve to puree.
10. Add the lemon juice and the garlic-pine nut paste to the mashed avocado, mixing well.
11. Fill the channels evenly with the pesto mixture.
12. Garnish with sliced black olives and pimento strips.
13. Chill, cut into 1/3-inch pieces, and serve.
